headline: Dow Jones Tech Titan Apple Rebounds From Support; AI Leader Teradyne Breaks Out

headline: Why CoreWeave Stock Is ‘Woefully’ Undervalued

headline: How Much Upside Can LRCX Stock's Growth Deliver?
summary: At $388.92, Lam Research (LRCX) looks set up for roughly 51% of upside over the next three years under a conservative scenario. That is a move large enough to justify digging into where it comes from. Revenue compounding does the work, but the multiple takes a meaningful cut along the way. Here is the operational reality the math is built on.

headline: Dear Astera Labs Stock Fans, Mark Your Calendars for June 22
summary: Astera Labs will join the Nasdaq-100 Index next Monday, alongside other high-growth names, following its strong Q1 fiscal 2026 results with record revenue of $308.4 million.

headline: Why Is Nebius Stock Surging On Tuesday?

headline: Teradyne Inc (NASDAQ:TER) Offers Affordable Growth With Strong Fundamentals
summary: Teradyne (TER) scores 8/10 in an Affordable Growth screen, combining strong growth metrics with reasonable valuation. Earnings surged 67% with zero debt, making it a balanced GARP candidate in semiconductors.

headline: Teradyne: Runaway AI Train At Hefty Premiums - Reiterate Hold
summary: AI-related demand now comprises 70% of Teradyne's revenues, thanks to their strategic partnership with numerous foundries. Read why TER stock is a Hold.
